brands: Cooperativa Latteria Vipiteno, Genossenschaft Milchhof Sterzing, Sterzing-Vipiteno
categories: Dairies,Fermented foods,Fermented milk products,Desserts,Dairy desserts,Fermented dairy desserts,Yogurts

agribalyse.name_en: Yogurt, fermented milk or dairy specialty, plain
agribalyse.name_fr: Yaourt, lait fermenté ou spécialité laitière, nature

ingredients_text: Yogurt magro 82% (latte scremato pastorizzato, fermenti lattici vivi), preparato al caramello 18% (zucchero, sciroppo di cara - mello 5.4% sul totale (sciroppo di zucchero invertito, latte intero in polvere, burro, emul - sionante: lecitina di colza), latte scremato condensato, zucchero caramellato, amido modificato di mais, aroma). Senza glutine
ingredients_text_de: Magerjoghurt 82%, Karamellzubereitung 18% (Zucker, Karamellsirup 5,4% (Invertzuckersirup, Vollmilchpulver, Butter, Emulgator: Rapslecithin), Magerkondensmilch, karamellisierter Zucker, modifizierte Maisstärke, Aromen). Glutenfrei.
ingredients_text_en: Low fat yogurt 82%, caramel preparation 18% (sugar, caramel syrup 5.4% (invert sugar syrup, whole milk powder, butter, emulsifier: rapeseed lecithin), skim condensed milk, caramelized sugar, modified corn starch, flavorings). Gluten free.
